name: External Potential — Sedimentation & Density Sorting
blurb: External potential — CC3D's ExternalPotential, added to the CPM core. A per-type constant force f gives every pixel the linear potential U = −f·r, so a cell drifts up the force. Here heavy (dark) and light (pale) cells start intermixed at the same height, both pulled DOWN, but the heavy type feels a stronger force — so it sediments to the floor while the light type stays afloat on top: density sorting / centrifugation from a single energy term. Because the force is constant, each flip costs only ΔH = (f_old − f_new)·r — O(1).
